metadata.description: Cross-reference of corpus.json against GORILA Vol 5 sign index and concordance. Younger Lexicon comparison approximated via lineara_id field.
metadata.younger_note: No structured Younger Lexicon data file available. The lineara_id field (present on ~1,626 documents) serves as approximate Younger cross-reference, as lineara.net is derived from Younger's Lexicon of Linear A. True reading-level comparison requires the Lexicon as structured data.
methodology: 1. Extracted all document IDs from GORILA Vol 5 sign index (3,936 rows), expanding range notation and bulk refs. Filtered sign-number artifacts (AB, A prefix).
2. Included all 468 GORILA Vol 5 concordance entries.
3. Built variant-normalization: face suffixes, merged docs, spacing, brackets, uncertain marks.
4. Matched each corpus document via: direct, variant-normalized, concordance enrichment, and known GORILA Vol 2 coverage.
5. Classified ours-only documents by likely cause.
7. Incorporated composite sign resolutions (A 506, A 684, A 718) and NO Za 1 gap closure.
limitations: GORILA sign index extraction covers 36 of ~183 pages. Documents on unextracted pages may be incorrectly classified as ours-only.
HT Wa concordance (~861 sealings) not individually extracted from Vol 5 pp. 139-155.
reading_younger and reading_gorila contain proxy values (lineara_id and volume/page), not actual sign readings.
Range-expanded GORILA IDs may include numbering gaps.
